description_long: This is a large, multifunctional wooden office desk with integrated shelving and storage. The upper section features two open cubby shelves on the left and a closed cabinet with double doors on the right. The main desk surface is spacious, with a curved cutout for ergonomic seating and a pull-out keyboard tray beneath. On the left side below the desk, there are three vertically stacked drawers with metallic handles, while the right side has a tall cabinet compartment. The wood grain finish is light beige, and the handles and hinges are metallic, giving it a modern, practical appearance. The overall design is suitable for use in offices, home workspaces, or reception areas in urban environments.
description: A large, light wood office desk with upper shelves, a closed cabinet, drawers, and a spacious work surface. Features metallic handles and a modern, practical design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the closed cabinet, open shelves, and the right-side tall compartment.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the side panel of the tall compartment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the three drawers, the open knee space, and the pull-out keyboard tray.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the continuous desk surface and the side of the upper shelving unit.
